title: Atlas OS
subtitle: An open-source dashboard toolkit.
description: Atlas OS is an open-source toolkit for building data dashboards — a design system, a component library, and a documentation site that ships them together. I started it to scratch my own itch and grew it into a small community project, owning the design language, the React component API, accessibility, and the docs experience from the first commit.
resumeBullets: Design and build digital products end to end — from interaction design and prototyping through production front-end code — partnering directly with founders and product teams.
Create and maintain design systems and component libraries that keep design and engineering in sync and accelerate delivery across teams.
Drive accessibility (WCAG-AA) and performance as first-class requirements, not afterthoughts, across every shipped surface.
Author Atlas OS, an open-source dashboard toolkit, including its design language, React component API, and documentation site.

testimonial.quote: Atlas OS saved us weeks of dashboard groundwork.
testimonial.author: Open-source contributor
